one_time_description: Distribution to members included in general government expenses, of which $1,425,000 was for minors
economic_notes: Takla Development Corporation involved in logging and silviculture. Subsequent to March 31, 2023, the Nation moved several assets and business entities to a Limited Partnership run by an independent Board of Directors. GBEs include Takla Development Corporation, Sasuchan Development Corporation, Takla Master Limited Partnership, Tse Keh Nay LLP, 1380089 B.C. LTD, and Takla Nation Holdings Limited Partnership.
notes: Six government business enterprises accounted for on modified equity basis. Large member distribution of $4,070,700 recorded in general government expenses. Province of BC transfers of $10,540,505 are unusually large compared to prior year ($3,061,554), likely related to a major capital or settlement payment. Own source revenue dropped significantly from $8,707,139 to $6,498,250. Subsequent restructuring of assets into a new independent Limited Partnership will impact 2023-2024 financials. No schedule of remuneration for Chief, Council or senior staff was included in the extracted text. OSR calculated as total revenue minus all government transfers (ISC + FNHA + Federal + CMHC + Province of BC + CSFS + CSTC + FNESC = $22,883,349).
